name: facets
description: Ship a PR through self-review locally — no cloud bill, no waiting for CI. Reviews the diff with a multi-agent panel (correctness, error-handling, perf, security, CI, accessibility, React/Next, AI-SDK, Web3, runtime-validation, ...), posts the findings to GitHub as inline review comments (never auto-approves), applies safe fixes when asked, and scaffolds the TIB → TIP → PR paper trail along the way. Also screenshots wallet-gated dApps (Reown AppKit) by injecting a test wallet so an agent can reach the connected UI. Local-first by design; pairs with the Anthropic Skills marketplace.
